title: Production Report Requirement Context
summary: Generate a production report for a selected hierarchy agent and date range using DATE_ADDED filtering and period-based summation.
known_facts: Frontend already has a hierarchy agent endpoint.
Frontend will pass the selected hierarchyAgent to the report.
Backend report inputs are companyCode, hierarchyAgent, startDate, endDate.
Totals should be summed for the selected period.
Source tables are not provided yet.
The exact summation field is not provided yet.
The report should not traverse hierarchy unless later clarified.
client_questions: What are the source tables for the Production Report?
What is the exact summation field for the Production Report?

required_backend_tasks.reason: The required backend report inputs are already known.

required_backend_tasks.reason: The source tables are not provided yet.

required_backend_tasks.task: Sum the selected production metric for the filtered period

required_frontend_tasks.reason: The frontend already has the hierarchy agent endpoint and will pass the selected hierarchyAgent.
